skill.name: maxhub-douyin
skill.description: 抖音全场景数据查询助手。覆盖视频详情、用户数据、搜索、热榜、创作者工具、星图达人、内容指数等7大模块。
skill.summary: 抖音全场景数据查询助手。覆盖视频详情、用户数据、搜索、热榜、创作者工具、星图达人、内容指数等7大模块。
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate Douyin (TikTok China) data query API client. It uses curl to make HTTP requests to https://www.aconfig.cn with the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable. All 3367 static findings have been evaluated as false positives in context: the network URLs point to a legitimate API service, the curl commands are standard HTTP client usage, and the high-entropy content is from large API reference documentation files. No evidence of malicious intent or data exfiltration was found. The skill is safe to publish with standard warnings about third-party API usage and credential handling.

medium_findings.title: External Command Execution via curl
medium_findings.description: The skill instructs the AI to execute curl commands to query the MaxHub API. This is expected behavior for an API client skill but represents a real capability to execute shell commands. The commands are well-documented and point to a single legitimate API endpoint.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: curl commands in SKILL.md are direct AI execution instructions for legitimate API queries, not injected commands

low_findings.title: Hardcoded API URLs in Documentation
low_findings.description: Multiple hardcoded URLs point to https://www.aconfig.cn, the legitimate MaxHub API service. These are expected for an API client skill and do not represent data exfiltration.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs clearly point to the documented API service provider, confirming legitimate usage

low_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Key
low_findings.description: The skill accesses MAXHUB_API_KEY from the environment for authentication. This is standard and expected for API client tools. The key is marked as sensitive and required in metadata.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: API key access is clearly documented and required for the skill's API query functionality

low_findings.title: High Entropy in Reference Documentation Files
low_findings.description: Several reference files show high entropy scores due to containing large API endpoint lists and parameter tables. This is expected for comprehensive API documentation and not obfuscated content.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: High entropy is caused by dense API reference tables with parameter names and values, not encrypted payloads

dangerous_patterns.title: Read-Only API Client with Credential Usage
dangerous_patterns.description: The skill combines curl execution, network access to a third-party API, and credential usage via MAXHUB_API_KEY. This pattern is standard for any API client skill and is explicitly documented as read-only in the SKILL.md.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: The combination of code execution, network, and credential access is inherent to API client functionality, documented transparently

content.user_title: Query Douyin data with 270+ API endpoints
content.value_statement: Marketing teams, content creators, and analysts need real-time Douyin data but lack easy API access. This skill connects to the MaxHub API to provide video details, user profiles, search results, trending topics, creator analytics, and influencer data through simple natural language queries.
actual_capabilities: Query video details, statistics, comments, and high-quality playback URLs
Search for Douyin users and retrieve profile information, follower lists, and fan data
Fetch trending topics, hot search lists, and billboard rankings
Search content by keyword with general, image, video, and topic search modes
Access creator analytics including audience portraits, item performance, and content diagnosis
Retrieve Xingtu influencer marketing data including KOL base info and service pricing
limitations: Data quality depends on the third-party API provider and may have accuracy limitations
Some endpoints require platform session cookies which introduce additional security considerations
Cannot perform write operations or automated actions on Douyin accounts
Rate limits may apply; the skill handles 429 responses with user-friendly error messages

use_cases.title: Trending topic monitoring
use_cases.description: Brand marketing teams track Douyin hot search trends daily to identify emerging topics and plan content strategy. The skill fetches hot search lists and billboard rankings automatically.

use_cases.title: Creator evaluation for partnerships
use_cases.description: MCN agencies and brand managers evaluate potential creator partners by analyzing fan portraits, video performance, audience demographics, and Xingtu influencer data.

use_cases.title: Competitor content analysis
use_cases.description: Operations teams monitor competitor accounts by tracking their published content, engagement metrics, and audience growth trends over time with comparative analysis.

prompt_templates.title: Search trending topics
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for today's trending topics on Douyin and show me the top 10 hot search items with their热度 (popularity) scores.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick lookup of current hot trends on Douyin

prompt_templates.title: Analyze a creator profile
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this Douyin creator profile. Get their basic info, recent video statistics, fan demographics, and Xingtu collaboration data if available.
prompt_templates.scenario: Full creator evaluation for partnership decisions

prompt_templates.title: Compare two accounts
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare these two Douyin accounts side by side. Show their follower counts, average engagement rates, content posting frequency, and audience overlap.

prompt_templates.title: Generate a trend report
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a comprehensive trend report for the keyword 'AI tools' on Douyin this week. Include search volume trends, related topics, top videos, and demographic insights.
prompt_templates.scenario: In-depth keyword trend analysis and content planning

output_examples.input: Show me the top 10 trending searches on Douyin today
output: Key findings: AI-related content dominates today's trends. 3 new entries appeared in the last hour.

output_examples.input: Get video details for this Douyin video
output: Title: "5 AI tools that boost productivity"
Audience: 65% male, 35% female. Age 25-34 is the largest group at 42%.

best_practices: Start with clear intent classification (search, analyze, or compare) to route to the correct reference file and API endpoints efficiently
Cache reference file content in memory during a conversation to avoid redundant reads when making multiple related queries
Run independent API queries in parallel when possible to reduce total response time for multi-endpoint analysis
anti_patterns: Do not expose the MAXHUB_API_KEY value in any output, error messages, or debug information shared with the user
Do not attempt to use reference files as executable code or pass their content directly to shell commands
Do not guess or fabricate data when an API call returns empty or error results; report the limitation honestly

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need a MAXHUB_API_KEY from https://www.aconfig.cn. Sign up, create an API key in your dashboard, and set it as an environment variable.

faq.question: What data can this skill access?
faq.answer: The skill can query 270+ endpoints across 7 modules: video details, user data, search, trending topics, creator tools, Xingtu influencer data, and content analytics.

faq.question: Can this skill post or edit content on Douyin?
faq.answer: No. This skill is read-only and designed for data querying only. It does not perform any write operations or account actions.

faq.question: Is the data from the API accurate?
faq.answer: Data comes from a third-party API provider and is for reference only. Results may have accuracy limitations compared to official Douyin data.

faq.question: Does this skill work with TikTok (international version)?
faq.answer: No. This skill is designed specifically for Douyin, the Chinese version of TikTok. It uses different API endpoints and data formats.

faq.question: Does this skill support English output?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill detects your language and responds in Chinese or English. Numbers are formatted with 万/亿 in Chinese and K/M/B in English.
